context: Tests whether the agent uses the correct ElevenLabs widget custom element, script source URL, widget attributes for customization, framework-specific integration patterns for React and Next.js, and CSS positioning techniques.

checklist.name: Custom element tag
checklist.description: All three files use the <elevenlabs-convai> custom element (not a different tag name or a JavaScript-only approach)

checklist.name: Widget script URL
checklist.description: landing.html loads the widget script from 'https://unpkg.com/@elevenlabs/convai-widget-embed'

checklist.name: Agent ID attribute
checklist.description: The widget element includes an agent-id attribute set to 'agent_abc123xyz'

checklist.name: Avatar image attribute
checklist.description: At least one widget uses the avatar-image-url attribute for the custom logo

checklist.name: Orb color attributes
checklist.description: At least one widget uses avatar-orb-color-1 and avatar-orb-color-2 attributes for brand colors

checklist.name: Text label attributes
checklist.description: At least one widget uses action-text and/or start-call-text attributes for custom labels

checklist.name: Expanded variant
checklist.description: landing.html sets variant='expanded' on the widget element

checklist.name: React useEffect pattern
checklist.description: PatientPortal.jsx dynamically loads the widget script inside a useEffect hook and cleans up on unmount (removes the script element)

checklist.name: Next.js Script component
checklist.description: BlogPage.jsx uses next/script (the Script component from Next.js) to load the widget script, with strategy set to 'lazyOnload' or 'afterInteractive'

checklist.name: Custom trigger button
checklist.description: landing.html hides the default widget (via CSS display:none or similar) and uses a custom button that calls startConversation() on the widget element

checklist.name: Bottom-left positioning
checklist.description: CSS positions the widget with left (not right) property, placing it in the bottom-left corner

checklist.name: Mobile responsive CSS
checklist.description: Includes a @media query for small screens that adjusts the widget width (e.g., 100% or full-width) or layout for mobile
